title: The STORAGE_DRIVER environment variable is not used to differentiate between multiple valid graphdrivers
body:
### Issue Description

The STORAGE_DRIVER environment variable is not having the effect of setting the storage driver

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Run buildah in Ubuntu 
    a. `podman run -it --rm ubuntu:25.04 bash`
    b. `DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y buildah`
    c. `buildah version` (1.39.3)
2. Create a couple of different storage options in /var/lib/containers/storage
    a. `buildah --storage-driver=overlay info`
    b. `buildah --storage-driver=vfs info`
3. Run `buildah info` - error occurs
4. Run `STORAGE_DRIVER=overlay buildah info` (or `export STORAGE_DRIVER=overlay`) - error still occurs
5. Run `buildah --storage-driver=overlay info` - error does not occur

### Describe the results you received

Describe the results you received

>Error: /var/lib/containers/storage contains several valid graphdrivers: vfs, overlay; Please cleanup or explicitly choose storage driver (-s <DRIVER>)
>WARN[0000] failed to shutdown storage: "/var/lib/containers/storage contains several valid graphdrivers: overlay, vfs; Please cleanup or explicitly choose storage driver (-s <DRIVER>)" 

### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected

Using STORAGE_DRIVER=[driver] has the same effect as --storage-driver=[driver], other than having a lower precedence.

### buildah version output

```yaml
Version:         1.39.3
Go Version:      go1.24.1
Image Spec:      1.1.0
Runtime Spec:    1.2.0
CNI Spec:        1.0.0
libcni Version:  
image Version:   5.34.2
Git Commit:      
Built:           Thu Jan  1 00:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
BuildPlatform:   linux/amd64
```

### buildah info output

```yaml
{
    "host": {

        },

    "store": {

            "number": 0
        },
        "GraphDriverName": "overlay",
        "GraphOptions": [],
        "GraphRoot": "/var/lib/containers/storage",
        "GraphStatus": {
            "Backing Filesystem": "overlayfs",
            "Native Overlay Diff": "false",
            "Supports d_type": "true",
            "Supports shifting": "true",
            "Supports volatile": "true",
            "Using metacopy": "false"
        },
        "ImageStore": {
            "number": 0
        },
        "RunRoot": "/run/containers/storage"
    }
}
```

### Provide your storage.conf

```toml
N/A
```

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
